name: Point to Point Methodics, Inc.
summary: Point to Point Methodics, Inc. engages in acquiring, managing, and operating technology based companies. The company offers Chosen app directory for developers; Smacktive, an app that helps to find people nearby to share activities together; FastMall, a consumer shopping app; various consumer applications, which directly interact with business software; NashPeeps for country music videos; and MapOs, a non GPS or Wi-Fi turn-by-turn navigation technology, as well as develops automotive app for consumers. It also provides digital sociology, and business intelligence and consulting services; and provides rugged outdoor fixed vehicle computers. The company was formerly known as Platinum Pari-Mutuel Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Point to Point Methodics, Inc. in February 2017. Point to Point Methodics, Inc. is based in Memphis, Tennessee.
